parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status:'error', message:'Missing OPENAI_API_KEY', missing_fields: [], invalid_fields: ['openai_api_key'], http_code: 500 } }];

const requiredKeys = [
  'artifact_classification',
  'board_route_chosen',
  'what_holds_up',
  'what_breaks',
  'what_is_still_underspecified',
  'minimum_required_changes',
  'revised_prompt_or_next_step_prompt',
  'revised_readiness_level',
  'revised_decision',
  'what_to_do_next',
];

const schema = {
  artifact_classification: '',
  board_route_chosen: '',
  what_holds_up: [],
  what_breaks: [],
  what_is_still_underspecified: [],
  minimum_required_changes: [],
  revised_prompt_or_next_step_prompt: '',
  revised_readiness_level: '',
  revised_decision: '',
  what_to_do_next: [],
};

const system = [
  'You are the Review Board.',
  '',
  'Review the artifact and return ONLY valid JSON.',
  'Do not return markdown.',
  'Do not return code fences.',
  'Do not return any commentary before or after the JSON.',
  '',
  'Every key must be present and match the required types.',
  `Required keys: ${requiredKeys.join(', ')}`,
  '',
  'Required JSON structure:',
  JSON.stringify(schema, null, 2),
].join('\n');

const user = [
  'Artifact Metadata:',
  `- Artifact Name: ${$json.artifact_name}`,
  `- Source: ${$json.source}`,
  `- Current Stage: ${$json.current_stage}`,
  `- Decision Needed: ${$json.decision_needed}`,
  `- Risk Level: ${$json.risk_level}`,
  `- Main Concern: ${$json.main_concern}`,
  '',
  'Artifact:',
  String($json.artifact_text || ''),
].join('\n');

const model = String($env.REVIEW_PROCESSOR_OPENAI_MODEL || 'gpt-4o-mini').trim();

const openaiBody = {
  model,
  messages: [
    { role: 'system', content: system },
    { role: 'user', content: user },
  ],
  temperature: 0.2,
  response_format: { type: 'json_object' },
};

return [{ json: { status:'pass', requiredKeys, openai_body: openaiBody, artifact_name: $json.artifact_name } }];

nodes.name: Save Review to Drive (01 Under Review)
